title: Arcane Imbued
description:
Adds multiple magical wands that can transform certain blocks into their arcane variant in just a click!

Use these newly modified versions of vanilla blocks to craft new weapons, foods and armor.
body:
Arcane Imbued adds custom wands, weapons and blocks to your world.

### 🪄 Custom Wands
<details>
<summary>Custom Wands</summary>

  Brick Wand, Transforms Stone, Endstone & Deepslate into their brick variants
  
  Arcane Wand, Transforms Diamond Blocks into Netherite Blocks
  
  Batrachite Wand, Transforms Diamond Ore into Batrachite Ore
  
  Cardinal Wand, Transforms Amethyst Clusters into Cardinal Shard Clusters
  
  Prism Wand, Transforms Flowering Azalea Leaves into Azalea Prism Leaves
   
</details>

### 🧱 Custom Blocks

<details>
<summary>Custom Blocks</summary>
Batrachite Ore, Batrachite Deepslate Ore

Azalea Prism Leaves

Magic Block

Cardinal Spike Cluster

</details>

### 🗡️ Custom Weapons


<details>
<summary>Custom Weapons</summary>

![In Order: Batrachite Sword, Cardinal Amethyst Sword, Forest Prism Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a37cb6e38ff70ca77b2dbfdeb3e88bdc2e1505a3.png)

In Order: 

Batrachite Sword, 10 Attack Damage, 1.6 Attack Speed, 1200 durability

Cardinal Amethyst Sword, 10 Attack Damage, 1.7 Attack Speed, 1000 durability

Forest Prism Sword, 11.5 Attack Damage, 1.5 Attack Speed, 1000 durability

![In Order: Batrachite Blade, Amethyst Blade, Forest Prism Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8119eefdd2a180ca15c21363826ddd1c26b0372b.png)

Each Sword Requires a blade to craft.
</details>
